name: No-fat, No-Cholesterol Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1-1/2 cups cake mix, yeast, flour, warm water, and egg substitute (or eggs) in an electric mixer.
2. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Spread the batter evenly in a greased and floured 9x13 pan.
4. Spoon cherry pie filling over the cake batter.
5. Mix the remaining cake mix with melted margarine and 2 tablespoons sugar until crumbly.
6. Spoon the topping mixture evenly over the pie filling.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
